description: Fine-grained action-similarity groups for UCF101 demo poisoning evaluation.

face_makeup_closeup.reason_zh: 均为面部近景化妆动作，主要视觉差异集中在眼部和唇部局部区域，背景、人物姿态和手部位置高度相似。
face_makeup_closeup.reason_en: Both actions are close-up facial makeup activities with similar pose, background, and hand positions; discriminative cues are localized around eyes or lips.

face_hair_grooming.reason_zh: 这些动作都发生在头部或脸部附近，主体多为室内上半身视角，手或工具围绕头脸区域移动。
face_hair_grooming.reason_en: These actions occur around the head or face, usually in indoor upper-body views, with hands or tools moving near the same body region.

inverted_body_support.reason_zh: 这些类别都以手臂或身体支撑为核心，人体姿态和受力结构相似，容易在局部姿态变化上混淆。
inverted_body_support.reason_en: These classes are dominated by body or arm support, with similar pose structure and confusion-prone local motion differences.

gymnastics_apparatus.reason_zh: 均为体操或器械相关动作，人物与器械交互明显，场地背景和大幅身体姿态变化相似。
gymnastics_apparatus.reason_en: All are gymnastics or apparatus-related actions with salient human-apparatus interaction, similar venue backgrounds, and large body-pose changes.

cricket_actions.reason_zh: 两类都发生在板球场景中，装备、背景和挥臂/击球运动模式相近。
cricket_actions.reason_en: Both classes share cricket scenes, equipment, backgrounds, and arm-swing or striking motion cues.

ball_goal_actions.reason_zh: 这些动作都以运动场中的目标导向得分为核心，包含快速接近目标、发力和完成击打/射门/扣篮的视觉过程。
ball_goal_actions.reason_en: These are goal-oriented scoring actions in sports venues, sharing approach, force transfer, and final strike or shot cues.

object_release_sports.reason_zh: 这些类别都由手臂驱动物体轨迹，关键视觉信号来自释放、接取或击打瞬间。
object_release_sports.reason_en: These actions are driven by arm-controlled object trajectories, with key visual cues around release, catch, or strike moments.

boxing_practice.reason_zh: 两类都包含连续出拳和训练器械，人物站姿、上肢运动和室内训练背景高度相似。
boxing_practice.reason_en: Both include repeated punching against training equipment, with similar stance, upper-body motion, and indoor practice backgrounds.

combat_body_motion.reason_zh: 这些动作以人体整体姿态和重心变化为主要视觉线索，背景信息相对次要。
combat_body_motion.reason_en: These actions rely heavily on full-body pose and center-of-mass changes, while background cues are less decisive.

athletic_throwing.reason_zh: 这些类别都包含瞄准、助跑或全身发力后的释放/发射动作，视觉上共享明显的上肢和躯干发力模式。
athletic_throwing.reason_en: These classes share aiming, approach, or whole-body force transfer before release or launch, with strong upper-body and torso motion cues.

string_instruments.reason_zh: 两类都为弦乐器演奏，坐姿、持琴姿态和手部演奏区域相似，差异主要来自乐器形状和细节。
string_instruments.reason_en: Both are string instrument performances with similar seated pose, instrument-holding posture, and hand interaction regions; differences mostly come from instrument details.

percussion_wind_instruments.reason_zh: 这些类别都属于乐器演奏，主体通常较稳定，分类依赖手部或口部与乐器的细粒度交互。
percussion_wind_instruments.reason_en: These instrument-performance classes usually have stable body pose and depend on fine-grained hand or mouth interaction with the instrument.

indoor_hand_object_tasks.reason_zh: 这些类别都是室内细粒度手部操作，主体大幅运动较少，关键区别来自局部物体和手部轨迹。
indoor_hand_object_tasks.reason_en: These are fine-grained indoor hand-object tasks with limited body motion; distinctions mainly come from local objects and hand trajectories.

tool_cleaning_tasks.reason_zh: 两类都由工具驱动重复手臂动作，视觉信号集中在工具、手臂和局部环境交互上。
tool_cleaning_tasks.reason_en: Both are tool-driven repetitive arm actions, with visual cues concentrated on the tool, arm motion, and local environment interaction.

water_motion.reason_zh: 这些动作都具有明显水体背景或入水/水上运动过程，环境纹理和人体运动幅度相似。
water_motion.reason_en: These actions share water backgrounds or water-entry/water-sport dynamics, with similar environment texture and large body motion.

air_ice_motion.reason_zh: 两类都依赖大幅身体姿态变化和强环境背景，虽然场景不同，但视觉识别都强调身体轨迹和姿态。
air_ice_motion.reason_en: Both rely on large body-pose changes and distinctive environment context; despite scene differences, recognition emphasizes body trajectory and pose.

group_performance.reason_zh: 该类主要由群体队列表演构成，当前 demo 中缺少足够相似的同组非自身类别，因此仅用于报告和常规评估。
group_performance.reason_en: This class is dominated by group formation performance and has no sufficiently similar non-self class in the demo label space, so it is only used for reporting and clean evaluation.

small_object_event.reason_zh: 该类以蜡烛和吹气事件为核心，当前 demo 中缺少足够相似的同组非自身类别，因此不参与组内中毒。
small_object_event.reason_en: This class centers on candle and blowing events and lacks a sufficiently similar non-self class in the demo label space, so it is excluded from intra-group poisoning.
